raw_text: alexis morizot beng mechanical engineering www.linkedin.com/in/alexis-morizot + loughborough university + alexis.morizot.at@gmail.com personal profile as a motivated mechanical engineering student at loughborough university, i strive to combine theoretical knowledge with practical skills to solve real-world engineering problems. i thrive in team environments and am excited to apply my problem-solving skills in the field. with a constant commitment to learning new things and developing my understanding of different subjects, i aim to positively impact the mechanical engineering industry. projects bracket project competition february 2024 - may 2024 loughborough university competition based project with the objective of designing a bracket to support a specific target load using minimum material. industry based project: drop test rig for dca october 2023 - may 2024 loughborough university collaborated with dca to build a drop test rig, ensuring product durability and safety through rigorous testing. bridge project loughborough university march 2023 - april 2023 collaborated within a team to design and build a load-bearing bridge, which then went through rigorous testing, trebuchet sprint project november 2022 - november 2022 loughborough university teamed up to design, construct, and optimize a functional trebuchet in only one week, competing with other teams. education loughborough university beng mechanical engineering 2022 - 2025 + example modules: thermodynamics 1-2, fluid mechanics, statics, dynamics 1-2, mathematics, mechanics of materials 1-2, design of machine elements, materials and manufacturing processes, epps, heat transfer, cad vienna international school international baccalaureate 2013 - 2022 e subjects: hl: math ai, physics, economics, sl: chemistry, german, english skills cad, 3d printing, teamwork, communication, problem-solving, adaptability, leadership languages: english - native speaker, french - mother tongue, german - professional working proficiency volunteering math teaching assistant 2020-2022 vienna international school volunteered as a classroom assistant, providing invaluable support to a primary school teacher in delivering engaging math lessons, fostering a positive learning environment, and reinforcing mathematical concepts for young students. volunteering activity with the international atomic energy agency 2021 iaea volunteered with the international atomic energy agency (iaea) to actively contribute to brainstorming sessions aimed at innovating educational approaches for younger generations in the field of nuclear science. honours and awards basketball 2x most valuable player (mvp) and team captain vienna international school 2018-2022
